---
title: "Tom Hardwicke"
position: "Senior Lecturer"
university: "University of Sydney"
image: "files/me.jpeg"
site: distill::distill_website
output:
  postcards::solana_mod
---
<style>
#bio p {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
</style>

<br>

## Bio

<br>

Dr Tom Hardwicke is a Senior Lecturer at the School of Psychology, University of Sydney, and Senior Editor for Statistics, Transparency, and Rigour, at the journal *Psychological Science*. He works at the intersection of psychology and meta-research (‘research-on-research’) on projects related to transparency, bias, peer review, scientific criticism, and reproducibility. Prior to joining the University of Sydney in 2025, he was a Senior Research Fellow at the University of Melbourne and completed postdoctoral fellowships at Charité — Universitätsmedizin Berlin, the University of Amsterdam, and Stanford University. He received his PhD in Experimental Psychology from University College London in 2016.

OCRID: <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9485-4952">https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9485-4952</a>
